programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Heroes
programme.desc: The PJ Masks try and recover a piece of the Evil asteroid from Ivan's pyjamas before he puts them on and turns bad!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels have bought Hennie a present for her birthday, but first they need to wrap it up. It's very big and will need rather a lot of paper. The Squirrels each choose some colourful paper and get wrapping.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: The Beach Race: Gemma is determined to win the Kangaroo Beach junior triathlon, score a trophy and most importantly, beat the pants off Pounce. But an emergency breaks out during the race.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When the new community library runs out of books, Mandy sends Norman and James on a risky journey to save the grand opening.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Runaway Kites
programme.desc: Benjamin's up in the air as the unwilling passenger of a flyaway kite!

programme.title: Cookie Monster's Foodie Truck
programme.desc: Cookie Monster and Gonger are Monster Foodies! They get a call and take an order from their friend who needs help with making red lentil dahl, their grandparents' favourite food.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel's Rainy Day At Day Camp
programme.desc: Daniel is disappointed when they can't play soccer because of the rain but Amira has surprise rainy day camp activities that make him happy.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Nim is running a bit late but eventually gets around to baking marvellous mango emoji faces, making a seagull costume and creating a fabulous \.

programme.title: Play School: What's Cooking?
programme.desc: Rise and shine, it's time for breakfast! Leah and Matt are joined by cook and food educator Alice Zaslavsky for a brilliant breakfast of zucchini fritters and homemade granola with yoghurt and blueberries.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: It's time to march to some great music! Evie is in the garden looking for insects - with her special tool a magnifying glass and she finds lots of Wiggly insects!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Lorenzo plays a trick on his loyal coach, Beppe, but he discovers that taking the legendary opera star Dame Bella Canto to the music festival by himself isn't as fun as he thought it would be.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish is at Tobby's birthday party along with her friends Cori and Jeffy. Tobby has just opened his presents and Tish can't wait to play with them.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish learns the piano and tries to play a new song. Although new to it, she struggles because she wants to be good straight away.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When a young Cornasaurolophus strays from its herd and befriends Ginger and the Peas, all is fine until it starts popping which draws attention of the Bananaraptors!

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back 65 million years to the time of Tyrannosaurus rex.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Felix the pig is stuck on a cliff ledge where not even Mojo’s tops can reach him.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: A new fish wants an adventure of her own.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle. As a result, Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: After seeing an advert for the London Marathon, Daddy Pig applies to take part to show the kids what grit and determination really looks like! So, Peppa and George step in to help train him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: It's almost lunchtime at Peppa's house. Mummy Pig suggests they all make pizzas together, so everyone prepares and chooses the food to make their own individual pizzas. Peppa likes making pizzas - it's all so lovely and messy.

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: While donating old items to Higgledy Heros charity shop, Maddie has doubts about giving away her old xylophone - can she really let go of her very first musical instrument?

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Cove beach is covered in a swarm of starfish! But everything is not as it seems! Why have they only got four arms, and why are they plastic?

programme.title: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programme.desc: Tom goes overboard using the Flying Fist Bump without understanding how to control it.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: On a paddle board expedition, the cadets get 'stranded' on a desert island. Meanwhile, Neville goes on a journey to become the ultimate balance master.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts And The Cone Snail
programme.desc: Only Peso can save the day when a cone snail invades the Octopod and tranquilises the crew one by one with its dangerous venom-filled harpoons.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Peter and Gwen chase down Black Cat and Rhino after they steal Aunt May's jewellery.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: When Penny plans to donate the restaurant's Lost and Found to charity, Flower sets out to reunite the lost items with their owners before they're gone for good.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Cosima and Big Lizard want to learn Dad's favourite song, but they need a drummer.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels see Duggee reading Wonderful Stories About Wise Animals and wish to learn more about what it means to be wise! Duggee can help as he has his Wisdom badge.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly accidentally turns Ben into a frog, and on attempting to rectify her error makes matters even worse.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Buns looks forward to sleeping every night so she can be well-rested for her superhero duties! But even though she's kept up all night by loud noises and is super tired, she is always super kind.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: When Batwing's favorite Bat-Net gets ripped during a chase with Riddler, she must learn to let go of her old net. / Clayface, Gotham City's messiest villain, arrives to cause trouble during Gotham's annual Clean Up Day.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bingo loves horsing around with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep their fun within her limits.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: A pesky goat is tethered in the sheep’s field, and threatens to eat all their grass. When it breaks free, Shaun is taken on a ski-ing trip all round the farm.

programme.title: Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin and Lloyd navigate the maddening Administration to rescue Lloyd and retrieve the Dragon Core, while Kai teaches Wyldfyre the importance of calm.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Political Campaign and a Candy Land Cheater
programme.desc: Unhappy that school funds are going toward football rather than academics, Sheldon decides to run for class president.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Proposal and a Popsicle Stick Cross
programme.desc: Georgie is thrilled when Veronica stays at the Coopers' for a few days. Meanwhile, Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis celebrate their one-year anniversary.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: As this year's exhilarating competition comes to a close, Bradley and Barney Walsh host as four grand finalists take on the superhuman Gladiators before going head-to-head in the gruelling Eliminator one last time.

programme.title: Kids BBQ Championship
programme.desc: It's go big or go home in this campfire competition where the kids are challenged with creating meals worthy of a starving cowboy.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: For this challenge, Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman are honouring the school library by asking the young bakers to create book desserts. They can make any dessert, as long as it's decorated to look like a book!

programme.title: Merlin (UK)
programme.desc: The kingdom is on the brink of collapse, with Morgana poised to strike. As Lancelot races back to Camelot with the dying Merlin, Arthur must continue on his mission to vanquish the Dorocha without them.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: A student named Marc gets akumatized into Reverser. Convinced that Marinette and Nathaniel made a fool of him, he's determined to get revenge. Will Ladybug and Cat Noir manage to reverse the situation?

programme.title: Total Dramarama
programme.desc: When the floor ends up covered in gum on the day of a big bubble blowing contest, Sugar decides she might help herself win by helping her friends get stuck to the floor.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Nom Nom recruits the Bears to act as his entourage of friends. But when the Bears realise Nom Nom doesn't understand friendship, they decide to kick their day of bonding into high gear.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Ice Bear goes on a late-night adventure to rescue his friend, Yana, from some familiar foes.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Chloe and Ice Bear drive up north to find the perfect Christmas tree. Meanwhile, Grizz and Panda are in charge of decorating Chloe's house.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears become noir-style detectives in order to live in a city inhabited by bugs.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: I'd Like to See Goku, You See – A Summons from Grand Zeno!
programme.desc: Zeno demands to meet with Goku and asks him for something very odd. Meanwhile in the 10th Universe, Zamasu's hatred for humans grows.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Rematch with Goku Black! Enter Super Saiyan Rose
programme.desc: Future Trunks, Vegeta and Goku finally use the time machine with intention to confront Black. But when they arrive, they're greeted by a familiar face and an unfamiliar power. Will they be able to stand up to this new threat?

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Bubbles joins the Derbytantes, Buttercup finds herself on the sidelines.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Keeping Team Brawl's secret leaves Ariana torn. Michelle and Eldon take a look back at their past as Anthony avoids confronting his present.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: We discover the surprising identity of Britain's top-scoring footballer, things get ridiculous on Germany's version of the Historical Who Wants To Be A Millionaire, and a Celtic farmer isn't terribly keen on plans for Hadrian's Wall.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When Agent Ori's first day on the job turns into a worst-case scenario, other Odd Squad agents share their own 'worst first day ever' stories.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In this two part episode, Olive goes undercover in a high-stakes \.

programme.title: Good Game Spawn Point
programme.sub-title: Olliolli World & The Best New Mobile Games!
programme.desc: We review the radical kick flipping skateboarding of OlliOlli World, plus we cherry pick some of the best new mobile games out there!

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs Resume At 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Nubs tracks down a harvest taken by birds.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Newton leads the PJ Pets on a mission to rescue the PJMasks.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: Music Is Everywhere: Nia is excited to see a concert, but when she gets stranded and cannot attend, Thomas decides to take the concert to her.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above And Beyond
programme.desc: While trying to help Dashi on her missions, Peso's little brother, Pinto, gets himself in trouble with a bombardier beetle and a steaming-hot geyser.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Aliens arrive from Planet Bong to ask the wise old elf to restore their hot and sandy planet by restoring all the plants.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch as Grandma shows her grandson an old-fashioned musical box and Tinky Winky and Po play with a magical musical box too.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.sub-title: How To Catch A Robot Dog
programme.desc: Norbert's robot dog, Alfred, is making odd sounds and not following directions. Elmo and Tamir need to push Alfred's reset button, but he keeps running away. After a toy ball and doggie treats don't work, they wonder what else could be used to catch Alfred. What if they make a fishing pole with a magnet? Magnets attract and stick to metal, and Alfred is made of metal! Let's try! It works. They didn't give up and caught Alfred to make him sound like himself again.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel And Miss Elaina's Kite Accident
programme.desc: Daniel is playing at Miss Elaina's house when they accidentally break her dad's old kite. They feel bad, but when they tell Music Man Stan what happened, he explains that accidents happen to everyone, even adults!

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Teddies are having a party and Morgan is in charge of the music. He buys a special \.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat devises a very special horse and cart ride for a tour around Cuddles Avenue for Lulu and Amy, in his converted Ratmobile pulled by two very unusual horses. But when Morgan joins the ride, the load gets too much.

programme.title: Bing MAIN
programme.desc: Sula, Pando and Bing find a bird's nest in their playhouse but learn they cannot both be in it at the same time. So Bing decides to give it to the bird until her chicks have all grown up.

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds follow a garbage truck, watching bins lifted and rubbish shaken, and see how recycling turns trash into something completely new.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Peppa and the family try to get to the playground, but Mr Bull's roadworks block the way.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Simon is repeating what everyone is saying today in Wiggle Town. Little Sir Echo has a clever solution: saying echo three times backwards. But how will they get Simon to say the magic words?

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The Farmer decides to build a golf course on the farm to impress the local squire.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Mr Gruber performs a magic trick for Paddington, who wants to show it to the Brown family, so Mr Gruber gives him a box of several magic tricks, but Paddington cannot master the tricks until he learns patience and practice.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale Of The Perilous Party
programme.desc: When Peter discovers Mr Tod is the host of a surprise party, he must save the guests from becoming party food.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Owlette 'accidentally' helps Pirate Robot attack the Flying factory.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Can Mojo and Bo get three puzzling passengers across Lake Swoppiton at once?

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Tidbit gets a big mosquito bite on picture day, he doesn't want a photo because he doesn't look like himself. Popcorn can't fix this, but he does know something that could help ... face paint!

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: Dirk promises to read Flower and Flour a bedtime story but when he's too tired to continue, Flower has to step in and invent her own bedtime story.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are introduced to some simple woodcraft in the woods with Mr Wolf.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Uncle Rad and Frisky accidentally turn up to babysit Bluey and Bingo on the same night, they have to work together to make Bluey feel better about babysitter putdowns.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When one of the Baby Pea-Rexes gets the hiccups, Ginger and the other two try all manner of cures to get rid of them.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Pounce On Patrol: Wearing Bondi's cap, Pounce thinks he's chief lifeguard - but when Gemma and Neville need rescuing from a whale encounter, should he jump in, or alert a real lifeguard?

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: A new fish wants an adventure of her own.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.desc: Captain Barnacles and his niece and nephew, Ursa and Orson, must rescue walrus pups who are stranded on a runaway ice floe, before it collides with a huge iceberg!

programme.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programme.desc: Charlie and Frida host a fort cafe with pasta, puppets, and a visit from Unicorse.

programme.title: Play School: Rainforest Rangers
programme.desc: Rangers Miah and Alex explore the layers of the rainforest, from the forest floor to the emergent layer. They play a guessing game using items from each layer, and Alex hangs around like a flying fox.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When James and Sarah compete for the title of 'best steam driver,' James accidentally spills a burning coal into a pile of wood, sparking a fire.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: Jeremy and Deena need to sneak into the playroom and shut down Glitch's Noise Maker machine before it wakes cousin Milo from his afternoon nap.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stan is called to fix Myrtle's sofa while she watches her favourite dance show with Hettie and Hattie.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Monsooooooon!
programme.desc: After their grandparents in India have a monsoon, Nikhil and Jay want one at home.

programme.title: Nature Explorers With Elmo, Gabrielle And Tango
programme.desc: When Grandma Nell doesn't have a book about leaves to help Gabrielle and Elmo identify some leaves drawn in Gabrielle's notebook, Gabrielle wonders if she and Elmo can make their own book to add to Grandma Nell's collection.

programme.title: Mittens & Pants
programme.desc: When Blueberry the tortoise buys the amazing cat toy Mittens finds at the swap meet, Mittens does whatever she can to trade for it.

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa go on the hunt for an intriguing sound.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups take a trip to space for a cheesy bite to eat. As the orders pile up Lucky Loover Bird chef, will they have the patience to wait for their food?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Trying broccoli as a new food can be challenging. Eddie learns how to overcome this by seeing, smelling, touching and finally - trying.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When horsing around with Dad goes too far, Bingo learns about finding her big girl voice.

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds ride a tugboat! They see crews tie giant ropes and help pull huge ships. After the mission they help check the tugboat's mechanics - gears, ropes, and the powerful winch!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Beavers and Broomsticks: A strange splashing sound reveals a surprising visitor in The Makery bathtub! Nim then creates a beaver picture, a pastry tree and a witch's broomstick. (S2, ep 16).

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Get ready for Sing-Along Day in Wiggle House! The Wiggles joyfully sing their favourite nursery rhymes, so come on and join in the fun!

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: Andy heads out on an Arctic adventure to find out where walrus mothers nurse their pups.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Betty the ice cream van is so full of ice cream that it’s making her speed around town out of control. It’s up to Mojo and Bo with the racer top to stop her and save those treats!

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and he's bearing gifts! What can they be?

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: To celebrate Freddy Fox's birthday, the children go on a trip to a Dinosaur Park. With Grampy Rabbit as their leader, they follow dinosaur footprints to find Freddy's birthday treat.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou meet a shy little creature called Small. It turns out she's a fan and she's even written a song about them.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Peas' sleep is disturbed by a noisy flock of Dragonfruitflyus.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Ben and Holly set out in the Elf Submarine to try and rescue Redbeard the Elf Pirate's sunken treasure. Mr Elf steers the Elf Submarine to the bottom of the lake but before they realise, they are gobbled up by Big Bad Barry.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Zigzag is surprised to find she can’t rollerskate as fast as she usually runs.

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie and Triggs are at the seaside building sandcastles. But when one seashell starts to move, they realise it's no shell at all, but the fanciest crab to ever walk sideways.

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie and Triggs are helping Dad in the garden. When he asks them to fill the watering can, they get distracted by the strange echoes inside.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley builds a crazy-golf course by using all the town's unwanted items. Nothing will go to waste!

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.desc: The Octonauts help a young manta ray find the secret manta ray feeding grounds, but when they finally locate it, the Octonauts become caught in the middle of a dangerous feeding frenzy!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Heroes
programme.desc: Newton, An Yu and the PJ Masks become prisoners of the team of supercharged villains - Who'll save them?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels take their teddy bears out for a picnic. But hang on - who does that HUGE teddy belong to? Oh! That's not a teddy, it's Beryl and she's a real bear! She wants to join in the fun too!

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Pounce On Patrol: Wearing Bondi's cap, Pounce thinks he's chief lifeguard - but when Gemma and Neville need rescuing from a whale encounter, should he jump in, or alert a real lifeguard?

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: The Pontypandy Pioneers are tasked with making a simple cup of tea to earn a badge and a new Pioneer Vest, but Peter and Mandy misinterpret the instructions and, in their attempt to make a cup of tea from scratch, accidentally start a forest fire!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Hero Rabbit
programme.desc: When a band of desperate mice mistake Benjamin for a hero and enlist him to retrieve their stolen peas, Benjamin gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Cookie Monster's Foodie Truck
programme.desc: Cookie Monster and Gonger are Monster Foodies! They get a call and take an order from their friend who needs help with making a food that starts with the letter C.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: When Daniel receives a gift from Grandpere, he wants more. Mom Tiger tells him that instead of thinking of what he doesn't have, he can think about what he does have. Daniel stops to appreciate his gift and loves it.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Before the excitement of the fair, Nim creates a sponge alien picture, bakes a fajita crab and makes a hook-a-duck game with the help of one of the Crafty Kids.

programme.title: Play School: What's Cooking?
programme.desc: It's lunch time for Miah and Takaya! To help build a delicious lunch box, Indigenous Chef Mark Olive shows Miah and Takaya how to bake a Warrigal Greens slice using amazing native ingredients.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Get ready to Wiggle! The Tree of Wisdom joins Evie, Tsehay, and John to share their favourite dance moves. Then, Caterina and Lachy help teach the limbo - even Captain Feathersword joins in!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: It's Darcy to the rescue when Monty falls down an old mine shaft while working on the new visitors' park.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Rosa and Pola are planning a family movie afternoon, but Tish and Bobby can't decide on what to watch.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: It's a raining outside, so Tish has planned her day in doors with a list of all the things that she wants to do. However, Pola and Rosa asks Tish to keep Bobby occupied.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes inadvertently start a massive roar off with all the other Vegesaurs.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back 145 million years to the time of Allosaurus - a massive meat-eating dinosaur that roamed the salt flats of North America.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A big duck statue needs pulling up treacherous Swoppiton Hill. Will Mojo and Bo make it?

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Triton accidentally turns into a kid.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: After finding out Daddy Pig has a place in the London Marathon, Peppa and George help Daddy Pig become stronger with lots of different, though not typical, exercises.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Peppa and George go behind the scenes to find out how TV is made when Miss Rabbit shows them around the set of Super Potato's TV show.

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: There's something fishy about Maddie + Triggs' newest house guest, but they are determined to get to know the new arrival and really figure out what makes him bloop.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Stan finds a special star stone which Grandad believes will bring him luck - and it does! But when Stan loses his star stone, will his luck change?

programme.title: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programme.desc: The Heroes get frustrated when Ben's alert system keeps sending them on easy rescues.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: When Spyke introduces Neville to his alter ego Daredevil Neville, her fun-filled Splash Bash take a dangerous turn.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts And The Artificial Reef
programme.desc: When an underwater hurricane destroys a small reef, which a frogfish and other creatures depend on, Tweak and her crew must convert the recently destroyed Gup-F into an artificial reef before the hurricane strikes again!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Rhino and Zola mistake butterfly chrysalises for jewels and steal them from the community centre.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurant with Grandad, but it’s a little different than he’s used to… he’s going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: Dirk promises to read Flower and Flour a bedtime story but when he's too tired to continue, Flower has to step in and invent her own bedtime story.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Big Lizard and Cosima create a fantastic water ride when they dislodge an underwater rock blocking a volcanic vent. It's all good fun until they realise the sea is starting to change.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Norrie is late to Squirrel Club, so Duggee teaches them all about the commute.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle struggles to cope during a busy day in which he has to launch a boat, judge a competition and make a speech.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Uh oh! Buns breaks MeeMaw's remote by superheroing in the house and tries to fix it and 'improve' it with new homemade icons.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Music Meister is stealing the singing voices of all the people in Gotham. Now it's up to bashful Buff to gain confidence in his voice and use it to take down Music Meister. / When Batwing's favorite Bat-Net gets ripped during a chase with Riddler, she must learn to let go of her old net. / Clayface, Gotham City's messiest villain, arrives to cause trouble during Gotham's annual Clean Up Day. / Buff makes a wish on a magic artifact for the other Batwheels to be turned into monster trucks, just like him!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends throw themselves into various games. Strolling the room, teacher Calypso gently nudges the kids into each other’s orbit, and soon make-believe mother Indy is moving into Rusty’s new house while waitressing at Bluey’s fish and chip shop! Everything’s going like clockwork, until an extra-large delivery causes Indy to almost step on Honey’s gnome village! Thankfully, Calypso is ten steps ahead, dispatching the Terriers to defend the village and save the day. Balance is restored. Only Pretzel remains, but his new game of catching fish gives Calypso an idea.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The tempting aroma of the Farmer's takeaway inspires Shaun and his pals to go on a mission to the local pizzeria, disguised as a human.

programme.title: Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: While the Ninja try to figure out a way to bypass Imperium's energy barrier, Empress Beatrix tests a deadly weapon powered by stolen Dragon Cores.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Broken Heart and a Crock Monster
programme.desc: The Coopers help a brokenhearted Pastor Jeff through a rough patch in his marriage. Meanwhile, Sheldon pressures church members for donations when Mary takes him to work for a day.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Swedish Science Thing and the Equation for Toast
programme.desc: Sheldon invites the whole school to a party for the Nobel Prize announcements. Georgie's wish for cable TV leads to a standoff between him and his dad.

programme.title: The Slow Mo Guys' Big Adventures
programme.desc: How fast does a whip crack? And would Gavin and Dan make good cowboys? Let's find out!

programme.title: Mythbusters: There's Your Problem!
programme.desc: An icy welcome awaits the MythBusters as they tackle myths surrounding all things frozen.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: Giantkiller End Game takes on Bloodsport in a very messy Main Event, and there's the first sight on the new Chomp which now weighs over 500 pounds.

programme.title: Merlin (UK)
programme.desc: The mighty citadel is buzzing in anticipation of the prince's birthday celebrations. But Arthur's old adversary, Odin, promises to ensure this is one party Camelot will never forget.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: The Doctors reveal why you need different shaped teeth to eat your food safely… by wearing some very strange gnashers! And they find out what it’s like to be lifeguards in Operation Takeover. We catch up with Ouch Patients Kaden and Maisie, and Dr Chris joins the Royal Airforce to find out what it’s like to give emergency medical care to patients in the back of a plane which doubles as a mobile military hospital! Meanwhile in Accident & Emergency one patient arrives after a nasty biking accident, and another has a busted wrist.

programme.title: Operation Ouch! - Do Try This at Home
programme.desc: There's chaos in the kitchen lab as Baby LiLou joins the doctors to reveal why you need kneecaps. Find out how your knees work with a simple Do Try experiment!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: Alya's big sister Nora gets akumatized into Anansi. Now a giant spider woman, she wants to show Alya how dangerous Paris can be. Ladybug and Cat Noir can't be flyweights if they want to stop her.

programme.title: Total Dramarama
programme.desc: When all their classmates are replaced with well behaved Australian doppelgangers in a school exchange program, Lightning and Cody start getting suspicious.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: To recover a missing package, the Bears get help from Ranger Tabes, an eccentric forest ranger. But her overblown sense of justice might be too much for the Bears to handle.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Charlie hosts an evening of spooky stories starring the Bears.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: When the Bears learn that Tom, his roommates and Panda's former apt companion are participating in a brother-themed show, they decide to join in on the fun.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: Panda gets kidnapped by a pair of deranged French foxes.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: God With The Invulnerable Body - Zamasu's Advent
programme.desc: With Vegeta out of the fight, Goku and Future Trunks must fight Future Zamasu and Black with a man down. But can they hope to defeat an opponent who brushes off even the strongest attacks?

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Zamasu And Black - The Two's Mystery Deepens
programme.desc: Zamasu's mind is wandering down a dark path. Goku and Whis think they've solved the riddle regarding his and Black's strength. His malice may be unnoticed, but Zamasu's ill will is beginning to dismantle his innocent facade!

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Bubbles isn't her normal, bubbly self, her sisters don't know how to handle it.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Pete tries to juggle both The Brawl and Regionals but it may be too much. Ethan discovers a huge secret within A-Troupe, Olive is suspicious of Ariana and Grace's friendship.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: There's public confusion when King Charles II bans coffee shops; mighty Egyptian Pharaoh Ramesses II meets some smelly peasants on Historical Wife Swap and a cave-dwelling Stone Age couple try to buy their first house.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In this two part episode, Olive goes undercover in a high-stakes “Rock, Paper, Scissors” game.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In the middle of summer, Olive and Otto must figure out why parts of the town are turning snowy and cold.

programme.title: Good Game Spawn Point
programme.sub-title: Pupperazzi & The Best Of Minecraft Caves & Cliffs
programme.desc: We review the puppy posing picture action of Pupperazzi, and the frantic disc flinging action of Windjammers 2, plus we climb high and dive deep to find the best bits of Minecraft's Caves and Cliff update.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs Resume At 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Kai faces his fears when spiders get loose in the temple.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Gekko is so anxious about facing a bullying villain, that he stays home one night to avoid her.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: After learning about Backwards Day, where everything is reversed, Thomas and Percy cause trouble when misunderstandings lead to mistakes.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above And Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts test drive the brand new Terra-Gup 2, a pangolin-inspired, armored gup, while rescuing creatures from a rockslide in the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The elves and fairies arrive at Planet Bong and meet The Great Leader, the aliens and their pets. The Wise Old Elf has to make Planet Bong beautiful again by bringing back all the plants.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: After it rains, the Teletubbies splash in the puddles outside.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.sub-title: Big Bird's Happy To Be Me Club
programme.desc: Big Bird wants to join the Good Bird's Club but the members turn out to be bullies who want Big Bird to change who he is to fit in.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: It's Quiet Time at school, but Daniel and Miss Elaina don't want to stop playing with their trains. Teacher Harriet shows the kids the different ways they can settle down.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat wants to throw out some old clothes. But his rubbish bin is full so he hides them behind some rocks on the beach. The Bananas find them while on beach patrol and Rat convinces them they were left by mysterious night visitors.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Teddies are putting on a play so Lulu enlists the Bananas to help backstage. The rehearsal goes well but things don't go so smoothly on opening night. Rat thinks it's deliberate and congratulates the Teddies on their brilliant play.

programme.title: Bing MAIN
programme.desc: Pando has an earworm, and Bing isn't impressed. When Pando can't resist saying its name, Bingly Bangly, Bing knocks Pando's tower over and wants him to go home. But then Flop helps to fix everything.

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds visit an observatory to explore our planets! They see how planets orbit the Sun, what they're made of, and there's a special trip to Mars!

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing hide and seek, but it is Freddy Fox with his super smelling nose who is the best at playing that game.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Captain Feathersword's hat and sword keep falling to the ground, they need your help, shout out when the hat or sword falls! The Wiggles try different dance moves to help Captain, will one of them work?

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The sly fox tries to take advantage of the animals on the farm being distracted whilst cheering on Shaun who was playing Bitzer in the greatest ping pong match ever.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Jonathan has lost his balloon. Paddington tries to get him a new one but accidentally ends up flying all over London. How will he get down? Pigeonton get help!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: When Peter realises he has accidentally upset Benjamin by asking him to sit out the next garden raid, he goes to apologise only to find his cousin has gone.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: With Motsuki's help, the moths infiltrate HQ and Gekko won't admit that he let them in until it is too late.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A crashed meteor in the town square makes every machine in Swoppiton dance... even Mojo!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Fergie is sad and disappointed when a sudden apple allergy means that she can't eat her favourite food or do her favorite activity-apple picking.

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: World Cup fever has taken over the Plaza! But when the live telecast is interrupted, Flower and Flour find a way for the whole plaza to have their own World Cup soccer match.

programme.title: Peppa Pig:
programme.desc: Peppa helps out with Danny Dog refurbishing his bedroom, and imagines a pirate adventure along the way.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad, standing on his feet as Dad stomps around the house, controlling everything Bingo does and causing chaos.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger releases a cage of Baby Coconutdons into the jungle but quickly learns that they've been contained for their own good! Ginger and the Baby Pea-Rexes must think of clever ways to get them back.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Frizzy's Treasure Hunt: While scuba diving over the reef, Frizzy swims off from her buddy Big Trev in search of hidden treasure and becomes lost underwater.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Triton accidentally turns into a kid.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.desc: The Octonauts must get two mantis shrimp to stop fighting before their powerful claw strikes destroy the Octopod.

programme.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programme.desc: Scarlett and Parker create a birthday-themed restaurant for their parents' first date night since baby Bobbie.

programme.title: Play School: Rainforest Rangers
programme.desc: Rangers Zindzi and Takaya explore all the fascinating plants you find in the rainforest! They create a rainforest terrarium, make a yummy avocado snack, and find out how different rainforest plants live and grow together!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Charlie takes the kids on a sailing lesson, he feels upstaged by Peter and a seagull. As Charlie tries to win back the kids’ attention, he ends up sinking the boat. / Fireman Sam and the rest of the team are training Mike Flood and Charlie Jones to be reserve firemen and Station Officer Steele is very pleased with their progress.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: Lauchie and Scarlett are making a homemade movie with their toys in the backyard, but Silver Paw is determined to be the superstar.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Mayor Myrtle is stuck in her bedroom and needs Stanley to get her out so she can get to the school for Tree Planting Day.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Anniversary
programme.desc: When Nikhil and Jay try to help Appa and Amma surprise each other for the anniversary of their first date, things quickly get out of hand!

programme.title: Nature Explorers With Elmo, Gabrielle And Tango
programme.desc: When the Nature Explorers' new butterfly friend flies away, Gabrielle wonders how they can get it to come visit their garden again.

programme.title: Mittens & Pants
programme.desc: Mittens wants to play pirates in a cardboard box, but every time someone else is in the box playing a different game. Will she ever get to play pirates?

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa have fun discovering wheels and the joy of motion.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups dream of living together in a perfect fairy tale castle, but when they don't succeed, they try to find another way to find their dream castle that's also suitable for everyone.

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie prepares for his first haircut by discovering that all the sensory experiences at a hairdresser's can be fun.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends throw themselves into various games. Strolling the room, teacher Calypso gently nudges the kids into each other’s orbit, and soon make-believe mother Indy is moving into Rusty’s new house while waitressing at Bluey’s fish and chip shop! Everything’s going like clockwork, until an extra-large delivery causes Indy to almost step on Honey’s gnome village! Thankfully, Calypso is ten steps ahead, dispatching the Terriers to defend the village and save the day. Balance is restored. Only Pretzel remains, but his new game of catching fish gives Calypso an idea.

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds explore a banana farm! They follow bananas from plant to market, learn about banana flowers, and discover a bunch is called a \.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Tree-Fi-Foe-Fum: Watering the Maker-tree gives Nim plenty of creative ideas. She makes a box street, a macaroni cheese treasure chest and a pick-your-own vegetable patch. (S2, ep 17).

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: The Wiggles explore their feelings, and with the help of Dr. Emotions, they learn how to express and manage their emotions. Shuffle dance with Tsehay in \.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: A common octopus has gone missing after a special sleep over event at Safari World. If they can find out where octopuses like to hide in the wild, maybe that will help them find it. It's time to go on an aquatic adventure!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Preston’s automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn’t go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story to help them fall asleep. But George wakes up, so Peppa makes up another story to get him back to sleep.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: After a family trip to a mountain beauty spot, Daddy Pig loses the car keys down a very deep drain.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri is sad when Lou goes away to a private meeting of his species, the Palorchecies.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When a seedling resembles Split’s signature sprout, the Pea-Rex vows to protect it.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Everyone is visiting snooty King and Queen Marigold's Castle. King and Queen Marigold give them a tour which features a room made of ice sculptures and an upside down room.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Daphne's psyched for her first earrings, but they hurt her ears! Can Vida find a sparkly solution?

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie helps Triggs greet the day and join the birds as they sing in the garden.

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie is waiting for the postman. She's expecting a letter from Uncle George, but each time she hears a knock at the door, it seems to be someone else.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley builds a lovely bug feeder for Fifi's new bug friend.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Flying Swords
programme.desc: In search of a mythical sword, Kwazii explores a pirate shipwreck that happens to be guarded by three swashbuckling swordfish!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Heroes
programme.desc: IceCub wants to prove how amazing his polar sniffing power is. By playing a mean birthday trick, Night Ninja tries to get An Yu to destroy the museum.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Reading, drawing, watering plants, running, dancing, making things, splashing in water and much much more. The squirrels tire themselves out. Duggee suggests a break to have a story with milk and cookies.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Frizzy's Treasure Hunt: While scuba diving over the reef, Frizzy swims off from her buddy Big Trev in search of hidden treasure and becomes lost underwater.
